name: Classic Gentleman's Cut
desc: Precision scissor and clipper cut tailored to your face shape, finished with a hot towel and styling product.

name: Signature Fade
desc: Seamless skin-to-length fade crafted by our master barbers. Includes neck shave and line-up finish.

name: Royal Beard Trim
desc: Expert beard sculpting, edge detailing, and hot-towel treatment to define your beard with precision.

name: Luxury Hot Shave
desc: Traditional straight-razor shave with hot towels, pre-shave oil, and post-shave balm.

name: Gold Scalp Treatment
desc: Deep conditioning scalp massage with premium argan oil and vitamin-infused serum.

name: Prestige Full Package
desc: The complete LuxeCut experience: haircut, beard trim, hot shave, scalp treatment, and facial.
